summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Orbit360 Engine - Hebrew RTL web app with YouTube analysis and voice recording features. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working perfectly.
passed_tests: All 11 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
GET /api/folders returns 4 folders with correct counts
Dashboard page loads with folders and quick actions
Navigation to all pages (YouTube, Voice, Library, Settings, History)
Sidebar opens from right side (RTL support)
Hebrew text displays correctly throughout app
Folder tabs and content items display correctly
Content item detail pages load and show content
Hebrew text input in forms works correctly
